scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for Dynamix

notes.combo_definition: three-lane (LEFT/FRONT/RIGHT) hit objects on bar-based timeline

tips.rationale: Dynamix provides a stable three-lane structure with bar-based timing, enabling deterministic lane-distribution and rhythm density tips once mapped to the element taxonomy.

table.name: adapter-validator canonical kinds alignment
table.expected: All emitted kinds must be within allowed canonical kinds

table.name: three-lane structural invariant
table.expected: Notes must belong to LEFT/FRONT/RIGHT regions with continuous positions

table.name: tips enablement gate
table.expected: Tips generation must respect Phase 4 gating

consistency_checks.notes: Dynamix consistency checks follow the Bandori anchor: enforce structural scope, lane-based geometry, and Phase 4 gating rather than raw-type or DB parity.
